feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Add a new work center into the last row + 1 in Tcode CO02
entry.content: Hi, I want to add a new work center into the last row + 1 in Tcode CO02, How can i record?

entry.title: Tcode or table for asset code and asset useful life.
entry.content:
Hi team,

Can someone tell me what the table is to retrieve the asset code and asset useful life at the same time?

There are 2 tables, ANLA and ANLB, but I can't see asset code and useful life at once.

Thanks.

entry.title: No sale pages en el home de S4hana cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hola.

Si no te aparecen las en pages en S/4hana cloud public edition, la solución es habilitar los intereses, para que te aparezcan en el home.

entry.title: Mostrar pages o páginas en S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Cuando entro en mi Dashboard de mi trial de S/4HANA Cloud Public, sin haber elegido antes mis intereses cuando creé mi cuenta, no me aparecían las cards (tarjetas) con los tópicos que había elegido. Posteriormente volví a crear otra cuenta (ID) eligiendo mis intereses, temas o tópicos que me ofrecía el trial, posteriormente aparecieron en el dashboard.

entry.title: List of SAP S4 Hana tables where Security Audit Log is written
entry.content: I am looking for all tables which are being referenced to see the logs ib S4 UI using SM20 transaction code.

entry.title: Attachment in Purchase Order API
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to create Purchase Order using API in S/4 Hana on premise system and found API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV is available.

Is it possible to post/read attachment using this API. If this is not possible kindly let me know if there is any other alternative way.

Thank You

Deepthi

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: Cancel Delivery Request - Stuck Queue on EWM side, delivery not created and no longer needed
entry.content:
ERP delivery is distributed to EWM, but getting stuck in queue due to missing customizing. Related errors:

  • Could not create header data delivery &1, system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION012)
  • No document type found for delivery type &1 from system &2 (/SCWM/ERPINTEGRATION002) 

The delivery is no longer needed, need to be cancelled / rejected.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S&OP - creation of product groups.
entry.content:
Hi,

S&OP - creation of product groups. 

All the materials are created with one material type Zxxx => no products with mat type PROD exist.

In MMNR via F5 I see no interval assigned to PROD.

Does it mean that I cannot use/create product groups in MC84 / at all if the materials are not of the mat type PROD? 

I cannot create a material via mm01 with the the type PROD.

Is there any possibility to create products groups for customized material types Zxxx?

best regards,

Walter

entry.title: Need Fiori App ID for Service Master
entry.content:
IN SAP GUI

We use transaction AC01 to create Service master we use transaction AC02 to change Service master we use transaction AC03 to display Service master this is not possible in Fiori Apps

please assist with  Technical or Business Catalogs in Fiori.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Reserved Characters for Business Place ODN Prefix - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

I have a question whether when defining the ODN prefix for the purpose of GST for Business places - India.

The Config in question is : 101319-Assign Number Ranges to Business Places for GST for India.

I have created the Business Places as per the states and wanted to give the prefix for the ODN as per the state codes such as the below;

 

Business Place - RJ (Rajasthan) 

then, it gives me an error as such;

If it was a reserved character, then it shouldn't have let me give it for the business place itself.

 

Is there any workaround or solution for the above do let me know. If we can give any relevant prefix for the ODN as i also tried the numeric state code for Rajasthan(08) and it gave me the same error.

 

 

Thanks,

Bhavesh

entry.title: Ariba Network + VIM in China via Baiwang
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

I recently saw an update from SAP regarding S/4HANA connection with Fapiao via Baiwang. Has anyone implemented this for China Entity. 

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDocumentandReportingComplianceElectronicInvoicingforChina/overview

Currently, we have Ariba Network implemented in our company and now with this news, I am looking to implement Ariba Network + VIM in China. 

Regards

Gaurav G.

SAP Ariba Procurement SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Can not use replication flows to replicate CDS Views from S4HANA OP to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi all,
I want to replicate CDS Views from S/4HANA On Premise to Datapshere using Replication Flows but I get this error while trying to import the CDS Views "Getting dataset definition failed for <the path to cds view>"

I have checked the relevant SAP Notes but could not figure out what the problem is.
In the CDS Views, there is also these annotations specified

@Analytics:{

dataCategory: #DIMENSION,

dataExtraction: {

enabled: true,

delta.changeDataCapture: {

automatic : true

}}}

Appreciate help from everyone in the community. Thank you!

@tobias_koebler @DanielKraemer @VinayBhatt 
I have seen the articles from you guys, maybe you can help here...? Many thanks!

entry.title: How do I read SAP S/4 Hana Security audit logs using ABAP code ?
entry.content:
How do I read SAP S/4 Hana Security audit logs using ABAP code?  What are the tables and functions which can be used to retrieve events data under security audit logs.

I have tried retrieving it from `RSAU_READ_LOG`, but seem like this doesn't exist.


Please help.

My SAP S/4 version is: 1909

entry.title: SAP MDG: Material - Hyperlink for Standard Fields Not Working
entry.content:
HI Folks 🙂

Hope You Guys are doing great 

Occurred with issue in Hyperlink - for Data Model MM

Problem is for standard fields only - Hyperlink (Not navigating to specific field)not working, but Error Messages & Information things are working. 

Looking forward for this solution Or Any Clues to get fix 

 

Thanks,  

Tarun.

entry.title: Accounting document long text
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As per the note - 3048704, Long texts are stored in ESH_SR_LTXT table, which gets updated by the program ESH_SR_LTXT_REPLICATE. We don't see the Text object for Accounting documents in this program. Is there any way to replicate ESH_SR_LTXT table with Accounting document long texts. Is there any other table where long texts are stored in decoded format.

Thanks,Girish

entry.title: Supplier Invoice S4 HANA Public cloud - CDS view for GST Tax amount & Withholding Tax Amount
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are working on developing a supplier invoice item level report and there was a requirement to add the GST tax amount and Withholding tax amount fields each line item wise.The report has been created using the following standard data sources 

  1. I_JournalEntry
  2. I_SuplrInvoiceItemGLAcctAPI01
  3. I_SupplierInvoiceTaxAPI01
  4. I_ParkedOplAcctgDocPyblsItem
  5. I_Withholdingtaxitem
  6. I_User

We tried fetching the tax amount field from the above cds and was able to get correct tax values for each line item in the supplier invoice item level report when we use the different gst tax codes for different supplier line items. But, we are getting cumulative tax values for each line item if we use same tax code for different line items due this the tax amount showing as overstated.

Is there any standard cds view that could give us the GST tax amount values at line item wise and also the WHT tax amount for supplier invoice at line item wise?

entry.title: Transitioning Custom Catalogs and Groups from Standalone Fiori to Embedded Fiori Deployment
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently operating with a central hub deployment and plan to transition to an embedded deployment model. Could you please provide guidance on how to migrate custom catalogs and groups from our standalone Fiori system to the embedded environment(S4HANA1909)?

Thanks

Nikhil

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori front-end server SAP S/4HANA 

@Jorge_Baltazar @Jocelyn_Dart

entry.title: S/4HANA 2023 Capabilities
entry.content: I wated to ask if there is a way to expose a CBO as an OData v4 service in an S/4HANA On premise, and add an upsert operation to it.

entry.title: Application object BUPA: Table /SCMB/D_BPTMGEN does not exist Message No. R1149
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have Followed the below mentioned steps

1. Ran the Transaction BP

2.Chose the Organization Button on the top to create once.

3.The Error mention in the Subject line appears and it appears for any of 3 button(Person,Organistion and group)

 

Kindly suggest every possible solution for the same


I did as directed in Question User Tags(Application object BUPA: Table SZA1_D0100 does not exist) i.e I ran BUSB and Added added all the fields as I got from SE16N or SE11 for the table   /SCMB/D_BPTMGEN but  still did not work
